positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for positive.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u35,negated_conjecture,
    ~class_member(peter)).

cnf(u20,axiom,
    man(michael)).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    taller_than(michael,X0) | michael = X0 | ~class_member(X0)).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    ~taller_than(X1,X2) | ~taller_than(X0,X1) | taller_than(X0,X2)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    class_member(michael)).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    taller_than(peter,michael)).

cnf(u27,negated_conjecture,
    ~taller_than(X0,peter) | taller_than(X0,X1) | ~man(X1) | ~class_member(X1)).

cnf(u26,negated_conjecture,
    taller_than(peter,X0) | ~man(X0) | ~class_member(X0)).

cnf(u46,axiom,
    taller_than(peter,X0) | michael = X0 | ~class_member(X0)).

cnf(u29,axiom,
    ~taller_than(X0,michael) | taller_than(X0,X1) | michael = X1 | ~class_member(X1)).

cnf(u28,axiom,
    ~taller_than(X0,peter) | taller_than(X0,michael)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    man(peter)).

cnf(u50,axiom,
    ~taller_than(X1,peter) | ~class_member(X0) | michael = X0 | taller_than(X1,X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define shooter(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define can_block(X0,X1) := $false
for all inputs,
    define can_jump(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define great_shooter(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for negative.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for negative.tptp
4. ! [X0] : ((X0 != michael & class_member(X0)) => taller_than(michael,X0)) [input(axiom)]
5. taller_than(peter,michael) [input(axiom)]
6. ! [X0,X1,X2] : ((taller_than(X0,X1) & taller_than(X1,X2)) => taller_than(X0,X2)) [input(axiom)]
10. ! [X0] : (~(class_member(X0) & man(X0)) | taller_than(peter,X0)) [input(conjecture)]
11. ~! [X0] : (~(class_member(X0) & man(X0)) | taller_than(peter,X0)) [negated conjecture 10]
16. ~! [X0] : (~class_member(X0) | taller_than(peter,X0)) [pure predicate removal 11]
18. ! [X0] : (taller_than(michael,X0) | (michael = X0 | ~class_member(X0))) [ennf transformation 4]
19. ! [X0] : (taller_than(michael,X0) | michael = X0 | ~class_member(X0)) [flattening 18]
20. ! [X0,X1,X2] : (taller_than(X0,X2) | (~taller_than(X0,X1) | ~taller_than(X1,X2))) [ennf transformation 6]
21. ! [X0,X1,X2] : (taller_than(X0,X2) | ~taller_than(X0,X1) | ~taller_than(X1,X2)) [flattening 20]
22. ? [X0] : (class_member(X0) & ~taller_than(peter,X0)) [ennf transformation 16]
23. ? [X0] : (class_member(X0) & ~taller_than(peter,X0)) => (class_member(sK0) & ~taller_than(peter,sK0)) [skolem symbol introduction]
24. class_member(sK0) & ~taller_than(peter,sK0) [skolemisation 22,23]
26. taller_than(michael,X0) | michael = X0 | ~class_member(X0) [cnf transformation 19]
27. taller_than(peter,michael) [cnf transformation 5]
28. ~taller_than(X1,X2) | ~taller_than(X0,X1) | taller_than(X0,X2) [cnf transformation 21]
29. ~taller_than(peter,sK0) [cnf transformation 24]
30. class_member(sK0) [cnf transformation 24]
32. ~taller_than(X0,michael) | taller_than(X0,X1) | michael = X1 | ~class_member(X1) [resolution 28,26]
47. taller_than(peter,X0) | michael = X0 | ~class_member(X0) [resolution 32,27]
49. michael = sK0 | ~class_member(sK0) [resolution 47,29]
53. michael = sK0 [forward subsumption resolution 49,30]
54. ~taller_than(peter,michael) [superposition 29,53]
56. $false [forward subsumption resolution 54,27]
% SZS output end Proof for negative.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation
